name: winget
title: WinGet
description: Search, install, and manage Windows packages with WinGet
author: eray_ercan

commands.name: upgrade-all
commands.title: Upgrade All Packages
commands.subtitle: WinGet
commands.description: Upgrade all packages with available updates. Also runs this extension's install/uninstall operations in the background, so keep it enabled.

commands.name: export
commands.title: Export Packages
commands.subtitle: WinGet
commands.description: Export installed packages to a JSON file

commands.name: import
commands.title: Import Packages
commands.subtitle: WinGet
commands.description: Import packages from a JSON file

preferences.name: wingetPath
preferences.title: WinGet Path
preferences.description: Full path to winget.exe. Leave empty to use winget from PATH (note: Raycast captures PATH at startup).

preferences.name: cacheValidityMinutes
preferences.title: Index Refresh Interval
preferences.description: How long the package index is considered valid before refreshing

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
